title: dev-skill-builder inputs
description: Typed Gate-A input contract for the dev-skill-builder. Shared schema used by all six skill-builder agents.

skill_slug.description: kebab-case directory name of the new skill

skill_category.description: Top-level skill category used in frontmatter `category:`. One of: `admin`, `apex`, `lwc`, `flow`, `omnistudio`, `agentforce`, `security`, `integration`, `data`, `devops`, `architect`.

feature_summary.description: Plain-English one-paragraph description of what the dev skill covers. Should be at least ten words so the builder has enough signal to decompose the feature; shorter values trigger REFUSAL_INPUT_AMBIGUOUS.

api_version.description: Salesforce API version written into generated `*-meta.xml` files. Must match pattern `^\d{2}\.0$` (e.g., `60.0`).

target_org_alias.description: sf CLI alias of the org used for Gate B live-org grounding (`describe_org`, `describe_sobject`, SOQL probes). Optional — when omitted, the builder runs in library-only mode and confidence is capped at MEDIUM.

repo_path.description: Repo-relative root of the caller's `force-app` source tree; the builder writes emitted artifacts underneath this path. Defaults to `./`.
